meta.title: Big Wave BJJ — Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu in Budva, Montenegro
meta.description: Big Wave BJJ is a Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu club in Budva, Montenegro. Classes for adults and kids, camps, seminars, and open mats. Affiliate of Kristian Cestaro Jiu-Jitsu Association.

hero.title: Big Wave BJJ
hero.subtitle: Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu in Budva
hero.description: Train with black belt coaches in the heart of Montenegro

about.title: About the Club
about.subtitle: Where passion meets the mat
about.text1: Big Wave BJJ is a Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu club located in Budva, Montenegro. We are an affiliate of Kristian Cestaro Jiu-Jitsu Association (KCJJA) — an international jiu-jitsu association known for producing world-class grapplers and maintaining the highest standards of instruction.
about.text2: The club offers classes for all levels — from complete beginners to experienced athletes. We also offer kids classes starting from age 4, camps, school programs, and corporate training. Whether you're looking to compete, get in shape, or learn self-defense, Big Wave BJJ is the place for you.

programs.title: Our Programs
programs.subtitle: Classes for every level and age

adults.title: BJJ Adults
adults.desc: Fundamentals and advanced techniques for all levels. Gi and no-gi classes with a focus on technique, strategy, and live sparring.

kids.title: BJJ Kids
kids.desc: Fun and safe training for children from age 4. We build discipline, confidence, and coordination through age-appropriate drills and games.

openmat.title: Open Mat
openmat.desc: Free sparring sessions and drilling. A chance to work on your game, try new techniques, and roll with training partners at your own pace.

camps.title: Camps & Seminars
camps.desc: Intensive training camps with guest instructors from around the world. Combine world-class BJJ training with the beauty of the Montenegrin coast.

corporate.title: Corporate Training
corporate.desc: Team building through martial arts. Boost morale, develop leadership skills, and create bonds that go beyond the office.

items.name: Marco S.
items.text: Best BJJ experience in Montenegro. Great coaches and friendly atmosphere! I came for a week and stayed for a month.

items.name: Ana P.
items.text: Started training 6 months ago with zero experience. Now I can't imagine my life without BJJ! The coaches are incredibly patient and supportive.

items.name: Dmitry K.
items.text: I train here every time I visit Budva. World-class instruction in a beautiful location. Anatoly's attention to detail is outstanding.

cta.title: Start Your Jiu-Jitsu Journey
cta.text: First class is free. Come try it!

coaches.title: Our Coaches
coaches.subtitle: Learn from experienced and dedicated instructors

coach1.name: Anatoly Abramov
coach1.bio: Founder of Big Wave BJJ. Black belt under Kristian Cestaro. Over 15 years of experience in Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu. Specialist in gi and no-gi grappling with a deep understanding of modern competition strategies and classical self-defense techniques.

coach2.name: Coach 2
coach2.bio: Professional coach with extensive competition and teaching experience. Known for a methodical approach to instruction and developing fighters at all levels.

coach3.name: Coach 3
coach3.bio: Competitive athlete and dedicated instructor focusing on fundamentals. Multiple medalist at national and international tournaments, bringing real competition experience to every class.

coach4.name: Coach 4
coach4.bio: Specializing in children's programs with a focus on fun and safety. Creates engaging lesson plans that develop coordination, discipline, and a love for the sport.

coach5.name: Coach 5
coach5.bio: Passionate about no-gi and self-defense techniques. Brings energy and enthusiasm to every session, helping students build confidence on and off the mat.

contacts.title: Contact Us
contacts.subtitle: Get in touch — we'd love to hear from you
contacts.formSuccess: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.

footer.description: Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu club in Budva, Montenegro. Affiliate of Kristian Cestaro Jiu-Jitsu Association.
